Collection 09

Jewellery Collections

“Silver, stone and pearl, transformed into art worn close to the body.”

The Jewellery Collection of Nona Dronova is an original artistic direction, in which silver, natural gemstones and mother-of-pearl are transformed into expressive art objects.

Back to Gallery
Series

Liberty

Substantial handcrafted rings set with natural minerals, uniting the power of natural forms, the plasticity of metal and the individual beauty of each stone.

01

Series

Heart of the Muse

A conceptual collection — an artistic meditation on the nature of inspiration. Pieces such as “The Naked Heart” and “The Open Heart” explore themes of sincerity, creativity and the artist’s inner energy, transforming a piece of jewellery into a symbolic art object.

Series

Signet Rings

A parallel series of sculptural signet rings, each set with a graphic symbol in black and white enamel.
